description: Unified candidate registry across all 4 producer tools. Consumed by ALL_CANDIDATES.pdf and per-tool candidate PDFs.

theses.hypothesis: AXS-05 (dextromethorphan + bupropion) for Alzheimer disease agitation has 60-70% approval probability based on 3-of-4 Phase 3 hits, Priority Review, and commercial prep behavior inconsistent with CRL expectation. Market implies ~45-55%, creating ~4.5% expected-value mispricing.

next_key_dates.event: PDUFA decision for AXS-05 ADA sNDA

theses.hypothesis: Atacicept (dual BAFF+APRIL inhibitor) for IgAN has exceptional NEJM Phase 3 data (46% proteinuria reduction, 68% Gd-IgA1 reduction, 81% hematuria resolution). Market underestimates commercial positioning vs sibeprenlimab based on superior efficacy and potential pricing parity with $292.5K benchmark.

Veligrotug (IV anti-IGF-1R) for thyroid eye disease has 70% PRR vs 5% placebo in active TED and 56% vs 8% in chronic TED. Stock down 51% from highs due to elegrobart competitive pressure, not veligrotug approval risk. PDUFA June 30 could trigger re-rating.

next_key_dates.event: PDUFA decision for veligrotug (Priority Review + Breakthrough)

theses.hypothesis: American Industrial Partners signed definitive agreement to acquire AVNS for $25.00 cash per share (72.1% premium). All-cash deal, standard antitrust review expected, shareholder approval likely. Market pricing ~95% completion probability at 1.3% spread.

Amazon-Globalstar merger arb with shareholder vote contractually eliminated (Thermo/Monroe 45.75% Stockholder Support Agreement executed Apr 13 2026). At $80.64 reference, 10.6% gross spread to $89.21 floor (post maximum $110M HIBLEO-4 milestone adjustment) over a 15-18 month close horizon produces ~7-9% annualised return. Primary residual risk is FCC spectrum transfer review; HSR/DOJ and milestone execution are secondary.

next_key_dates.event: Schedule 14C information statement expected (30 days post-8-K)
HSR filing and 30-day waiting period expected
S-4 registration statement for stock-election consideration (45 business days from signing)
Expected close (base case mid-2027, contingent on FCC + HIBLEO-4 milestones)

theses.hypothesis: Forager Fund accumulated 12.9% of RPAY; board adopted poison pill with 12.5% trigger calibrated precisely below Forager's stake. Three 13D amendments in 30 days suggest imminent proxy contest or sale demand. Activist campaigns of this type historically deliver 30-60% returns over 6-18 months.

next_key_dates.event: PREC14A preliminary proxy statement (if Forager formally contests)
DEF 14A annual meeting proxy (nomination window critical catalyst)

theses.hypothesis: Toa Road Corporation (1882.XTKS) disclosed a litigation regulatory matter on 2026-04-15 (scanner score 29.0, tc 0.85, $485M USD mcap). next_key_dates.event: Resolution window (T+5 to T+30 typical for this signal type)

Beretta Holding S.A. (RGR's largest individual shareholder at 9.95%) has launched a multi-track activist campaign — a $44.80/share cash partial tender offer for an additional ~20% of shares (subject to Pill exemption) and a four-nominee minority slate at the 2026 Annual Meeting. The market has only modestly repriced (+4.2%, still 5.8% below the publicly disclosed tender price) on declining volume, indicating it is heavily discounting the Pill-exemption probability and the optionality of a Chancery test or negotiated settlement. Asymmetric setup: tender clears +5.8%, settlement +10–25%, withdrawal -5–10% downside floored by Beretta's continuing 9.95% support.

next_key_dates.event: Board response to Pill-exemption ask (deadline already passed Mar 31)
Beretta files Delaware Chancery action (if Pill exemption denied)
Ruger DEF 14A filing — fixes 2026 Annual Meeting date
ISS / Glass Lewis recommendations (T-14 to T-10 from AM)
Tender offer commencement (~10 days post Pill exemption)

theses.hypothesis: SEM is a signed WCAS XIV + Ortenzio family take-private at $16.50/sh cash with only a 0.73% gross spread over a ~7.5-month horizon to the 2026-12-01 Outside Date — ~1.1% annualized, below risk-free. Deal certainty is relatively high (top-quartile PE sponsor + family rollover) but the risk/reward is asymmetric (+0.7% upside vs ~-14.5% break downside). Watchlist stance: re-engage only on spread widening to 3%+ via HSR pushback, shareholder litigation bump, or financing disruption.

next_key_dates.event: DEF 14A definitive proxy expected (20-45 days post-PREM14A)

theses.hypothesis: Predictive Discovery (PDI.XASX) and Robex Resources (RBX.TSXV) are completing a merger-of-equals via Quebec statutory plan of arrangement. All conditions precedent satisfied; deal is unconditional with effective date ~April 15, 2026. Exchange ratio 7.862 PDI shares per Robex share. Arb spread is ~0.9%, below execution friction threshold. Recommendation: no trade (procedural update on done deal).

next_key_dates.event: Post-merger combined resource update / DFS refresh (H2 2026)

theses.hypothesis: Daito Trust Construction (1878.XTKS, mcap $7.2B) is conducting a tender offer for THE Global Co. (3271.XTKS) at ¥1,280/share (~19.9% premium). Board has recommended acceptance. Correction filing on Apr 16 is most likely administrative. Spread is very tight (<2%), making this a low-IRR but high-certainty arb. Trade is on the target (3271), not the bidder. Recommendation: WATCH unless spread widens above 3%.
theses.event_descriptor: Daito Trust Global Tender Offer Correction

theses.hypothesis: Intertek Group (ITRK.XLON, FTSE 100, mcap £6.6B) received a Rule 2.4 possible offer from EQT (Swedish PE). Board rejected the indicative proposal on Apr 13 and simultaneously announced a strategic review to potentially split into two businesses. Shares +13% to 4,292p despite rejection. PUSU deadline May 14. No price disclosed. Historical 2.4→2.7 conversion rate ~55%. Multi-path setup: revised EQT bid, strategic-review value unlock, or walk-away. Recommendation: WATCH with 1-3% satellite sizing.

next_key_dates.event: Rule 2.7 firm offer (if converts, T+28 to T+56)
